title: medicago lupulina var. glandulosa
intro: Medicago lupulina var. glandulosa, also known as glandular yellow trefoil, is a variety of the yellow trefoil plant, a type of legume native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Glandular yellow trefoil can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
